sourceMovie.title: The Unholy Trinity
sourceMovie.whyPeopleLoveIt: Audiences latched onto The Unholy Trinity (2025) as a western theatrical experience: big enough for a group watch, specific enough to reward a second viewing once you know where it's headed. The western and adventure blend is the engine: it lets the film shift registers without feeling like two different movies stitched together.

recommendations.title: Hostiles
recommendations.whyYoullLoveIt: If The Unholy Trinity clicked for you, Hostiles (2017) is a strong next stop: both trade in western and adventure, with momentum and clean stakes. Expect a different story, but a similar willingness to go big when the moment demands it.

faq.question: What should I watch after The Unholy Trinity?
faq.answer: Try Hostiles, Young Guns, Let Him Go—each shares DNA with The Unholy Trinity while changing the setting enough to feel fresh.

faq.question: What genre is The Unholy Trinity?
faq.answer: The Unholy Trinity (2025) is best described as Western, Adventure, Crime. Stores and algorithms use different labels, but that mix is what fans actually recognize on a rewatch.

faq.question: Is The Unholy Trinity worth revisiting?
faq.answer: Viewer scores sit around 6.3/10 on TMDB—high enough that replays are common for people who like this western lane.
